hooks.command: [ -f package.json ] && npm run typecheck --silent 2>&1 | head -20 || true
[ -f src/lib/pipeline/orchestrator.ts ] && grep -q 'checkBudget' src/lib/pipeline/orchestrator.ts || echo '⚠️  WARNING: orchestrator.ts may be missing budget checks'
echo $TOOL_INPUT | grep -qiE 'rm -rf|drop table|delete from|firebase.*delete' && echo '⛔ Destructive command detected — confirm before proceeding' || true
